name: audioworld
description: Geolocation-based spatial audio experience — walk into a soundscape and hear where each source is and how far away.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,admin,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:admin" "npm:dev:client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
